title: Director Nominations Open for Koniag’s 2025 Board Election
summary: Nominations are open for Shareholders seeking election to Koniag’s Board of Directors. Three (3) seats are up for election at the Annual Meeting of Shareholders to be held Saturday, October 4, 2025, in Seattle, Washington. All valid nominations will be included in the corporation’s proxy statement....

title: 2025 SBDC Summit: Driving Innovation, Healthcare, & Small Business in Alaska
summary: The 2025 Alaska Small Business Development Center (SBDC) Summit is fast approaching! Scheduled for February 28, 2025 , at the Marriott Downtown Hotel in Anchorage , this year’s Summit will explore the intersection of artificial intelligence (AI), healthcare, and small business, providing a crucial platform for Alaska’s entrepreneurs to discover new technologies, resources, and strategies to drive their businesses...
